surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Crystal Glass - bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 shadow-sm
surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Solid surface - bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-colors
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: Primary: bg-[#007AFF] text-white hover:bg-[#3395FF] rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all. Secondary: bg-white/5 text-white hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-6 py-3

hero_carousel.title: Premium Laptops

components_and_interactions.navigation: Sticky header with glassmorphism. Contains Brand Logo (text), links (Products, Brands, Contact), Language Switcher (TR/EN toggle), and Admin Dashboard link.
components_and_interactions.hero: Full-bleed carousel with crossfade or slide transition. Use 'lucide-react' chevrons for controls. Text overlay is bottom-left aligned, inside a p-12 container to ensure readability. Ensure gradient overlay at bottom `bg-gradient-to-t from-black via-black/50 to-transparent`.
components_and_interactions.brands_marquee: Use react-fast-marquee. Grayscale filter on brand logos `filter grayscale hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-300 opacity-70 hover:opacity-100`. Smooth, slow drift.
components_and_interactions.contact_form: Shadcn form. Dark inputs `bg-[#0A0A0A] border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:border-[#007AFF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#007AFF]`. 'Submit' button takes primary styling.
components_and_interactions.admin_dashboard: Grid layout (Control Room archetype). Cardless or very subtle 1px border cards. Dense data for managing Carousel items and Brands. Use Shadcn tables, dialogs, and forms. Color: strict monochrome + #007AFF.
components_and_interactions.language_switcher: Dropdown menu using Shadcn, simple text swap TR / EN.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme colors provided.
Use Outfit for all headings and Manrope for body text.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states (e.g., buttons, links, cards).
Use the provided media URLs for the hero carousel and brand logos placeholder, which the admin can 'manage' via state.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Do NOT use default blue/purple gradients.
Apply `data-testid` to all forms, inputs, buttons, and navigation items.
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide icons for all UI iconography.
Header must use crystal glassmorphism `backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10`.
